headline: International Business Machines (IBM) Is Up 10.2% After Unveiling 0.7 nm Nanostack Chip Breakthrough
summary: In late June 2026, IBM unveiled the world’s first sub-1 nanometer chip technology at the 0.7 nm “nanostack” node, packing nearly 100 billion transistors onto a fingernail-sized chip and extending logic scaling into the angstrom era for AI and high-performance computing. This breakthrough, alongside IBM’s recent AI security collaborations and quantum foundry plans, signals a deeper push to supply the core infrastructure underpinning future enterprise and frontier AI workloads. We’ll now...

headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Teams With IBM And Red Hat On AI Cyber Threats
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) announced a collaboration with IBM and Red Hat to address AI-driven cyber threats. The partnership focuses on open-source software and critical infrastructure environments. The companies plan to integrate virtual patching with software remediation and coordinated vulnerability response. Palo Alto Networks is a large cybersecurity company with a focus on network, cloud, and security operations platforms. This new collaboration with IBM and Red Hat speaks...

headline: Quantum Computing Just Hit Commercial Viability and Trump’s $2 Billion Quantum Push Has These 3 ETFs Sitting on Top of the Trade
summary: The Commerce Department’s $2 billion in planned CHIPS R&D funding for nine quantum companies, announced in May, gave the quantum computing trade something it lacked for a decade: a federal balance sheet behind it. Three exchange-traded funds capture the trade from different angles. The Defiance Quantum ETF (NASDAQ:QTUM) is the closest thing to a pure-play. ... Quantum Computing Just Hit Commercial Viability and Trump’s $2 Billion Quantum Push Has These 3 ETFs Sitting on Top of the Trade
